name: caushell-codex
description: Session-aware shell guardrails for Codex backed by the Caushell runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Session-aware shell guardrails for Codex Bash tool use.
interface.longDescription: Caushell Codex adds session-aware shell guardrails to Codex through official Codex hooks. It keeps parsing, provenance, taint analysis, and policy reasoning inside the Caushell Rust runtime.
defaultPrompt: Use Caushell Codex to guard Bash commands during this session
